overall.description: First-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night. The player moves along neon-lit streets with palm trees, passing pedestrians and an NCPD police car. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, towering skyscrapers, and futuristic architecture typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with palm trees and utility infrastructure

events.description: camera passes extremely close to palm tree trunk temporarily filling the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, approaching a pedestrian standing near a wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light blue shirt and dark pants standing against wall, looking at phone

entered.detail: tall palm tree with textured trunk wrapped in metal bands and cables
vertical concrete pole with attached wires and green illuminated digital signage
storefront with bright pink and cyan neon displays and vertical light strips
elevated pedestrian bridge with yellow safety railings spanning across the street above
large digital billboard with red background displaying cologne advertisement
rain-slicked concrete sidewalk with yellow tactile paving strips reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, walking along a covered sidewalk lined with palm trees. The camera passes close to a utility pole with green digital signage, while neon shop fronts glow on the right. A pedestrian stands near a large red billboard advertising cologne, and the wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with food vendors and digital storefronts

agents.ego_description: passing the stationary pedestrian and continuing along the storefronts with bright displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket and jeans walking toward camera then passing by on the left

entered.detail: temporary construction barriers painted yellow with graffiti and warning signs
small commercial stall with illuminated menu displays and neon green accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the commercial street, the camera passes the pedestrian and moves past storefronts with glowing displays. Yellow concrete barriers appear on the right side of the walkway, and the overhead industrial structure remains visible above. The wet sidewalk continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights from the shops.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection beneath massive highway overpass

events.description: exits covered sidewalk and enters open intersection area under massive concrete overpass
begins crossing the wide street at marked crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection with other pedestrians, moving from sidewalk to crosswalk under the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing green backpack and shorts walking ahead into the crosswalk

entered.detail: giant concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars and yellow structural beams
tall building with distinctive red paneling and multiple digital billboards displaying advertisements
broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines with WAIT text visible

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide urban intersection beneath a massive concrete overpass. The camera moves from the sheltered sidewalk onto the exposed crosswalk, passing under the highway structure. A distinctive red building with digital billboards rises on the left, while pedestrians with glowing accessories cross the street alongside the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown street with police presence and parked vehicles

events.description: passing parked NCPD police car with illuminated digital side panels on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the police car and pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car parked at curb with digital display panels showing POLICE text
pedestrian with bright pink hair and blue jacket holding illuminated umbrella

entered.detail: futuristic black and white police sedan with digital side panels displaying POLICE and NCPD text
large purple and white advertisement sign for NICOLA brand with bold lettering
olive green vintage-style futuristic sedan with white roof parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving along a busy downtown street after crossing the intersection. An NCPD police car is parked on the right with its digital displays illuminated. The camera passes pedestrians carrying futuristic umbrellas, including one with distinctive pink hair. A large NICOLA billboard and parked futuristic vehicles line the street as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk district, moving from a sheltered commercial sidewalk into a wide, exposed urban intersection. It begins along a covered walkway lined with palm trees and glowing neon shop fronts, passing a utility pole with green digital signage and a pedestrian standing by a large red cologne billboard. As the camera continues past glowing storefronts and yellow concrete barriers, the scene opens up into a massive intersection beneath a concrete overpass, where the camera leaves the shelter to cross the street alongside pedestrians with glowing accessories. The movement then shifts toward a busy downtown thoroughfare, passing a parked NCPD police car with illuminated displays and people carrying futuristic umbrellas. Finally, the camera glides past a large Nicola billboard and parked futuristic vehicles as the rain continues to fall over the reflective city streets.
